## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Scope

- [ ] Production code
- [ ] Research pipeline
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] CI only

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is based on `v0.2.0-planning` (for v0.2.0 work)
- [ ] Commit messages follow repo convention
- [ ] Relevant tests were run locally
- [ ] No unrelated files were changed
- [ ] Passive research constraints are preserved

## Test Evidence

List exact commands you ran and their result.

## Risk / Rollback

Short note on risk level and rollback plan.
